title: Dialog records stronger 3Q26 as it keeps focus on long-term plans
text: PETALING JAYA: Dialog Group Bhd is staying focused in the pursuit of its key long-term strategies, while remaining confident that its business model is well structured to weather headwinds arising from economic uncertainty, oil price volatility and currency movements.
llm_justification: The company remains confident in its business model despite economic uncertainty and volatility, but acknowledges potential headwinds.

text: The group said it will continue to build and strengthen its competencies by investing in as well as upskilling its workforce and digital transformation to ensure efficiency and competitiveness.

title: Dialog records stronger 3Q26 as it keeps focus on long-term plans
text: Releasing its results for the third quarter (3Q26) for the financial year ending June (FY26) yesterday, Dialog saw net profit improve by 9.9% year-on-year (y-o-y) to RM148.3mil, as revenue climbed 20.4% to RM696.9mil.
llm_justification: Dialog's 9.9% net profit increase and 20.4% revenue growth indicate a positive real economic activity.

title: Dialog records stronger 3Q26 as it keeps focus on long-term plans
text: In a bourse filing, the group attributed the improved 1Q26 y-o-y showing to strong performance that was driven by positive contribution across its businesses, particularly its Malaysia operations.

title: Dialog records stronger 3Q26 as it keeps focus on long-term plans
text: Cumulatively for the nine months ended March, bottom line almost tripled y-o-y to RM426mil, as turnover increased by 11.5% to RM2.11bil.

title: Dialog records stronger 3Q26 as it keeps focus on long-term plans
